title: MS / MD Jobs 2026 – Junior Research Fellow
shortInfo: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Recruitment 2026: 1 Junior Research Fellow vacancy announced under Advt No. Project/2026/009. Eligible candidates can apply online on or before 28 May 2026 through the official NIPER Ahmedabad website.

basic_details.job_title: NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Recruitment 2026: 1 Junior Research Fellow vacancy announced under Advt No. Project/2026/009. Eligible candidates can apply online on or before 28 May 2026 through the official NIPER Ahmedabad website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.S.(Pharm.)/ M. Pharm./ M. Tech/ M.E./ M.Tech./ M.Sc, M.D, M.V.Sc.
qualification.details: M.S.(Pharm.)/ M. Pharm./ M. Tech. (Pharm.) (Pharmacology and Toxicology/Regulatory Toxicology/ Biotechnology; M.E./ M.Tech./ M.Sc. (Pharmacology/ Biotechnology/Biochemistry/ Toxicology/ Physiology/ Life Sciences/Biomedical Science/ M.D. (Pharmacology), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology/ Pathology/Biotechnology). or P.G. degree with 60% marks for GN/OBC (55% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized university / Institute, autonomous bodies NIPERs/IITs/IISERs

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow positions is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post announced by NIPER Ahmedabad.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The required qualification includes M.S.(Pharm.)/ M. Pharm./ M. Tech. (Pharm.) or equivalent P.G. degrees with specific marks criteria from a UGC recognized university or institute.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 23,213 to Rs. 31,000 per month, with variations based on NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, shortlisting of candidates, followed by an interview (online or offline), and document verification.

faq.question: How can I apply for the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official website of NIPER Ahmedabad or via the direct application link provided.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER Ahmedabad).

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article.
